pageContext.name: Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition, a special edition licensed BTS collectible inspired by the hit song DNA from the album LOVE YOURSELF 承 'Her.'  Measuring 7 tall and 4.5 wide, the Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition takes the iconic shape of the 21st-century pop icons' logo, visualized as a set of doors opening outward to possibility, and incorporates lyrics and vibrant doodles in celebration of RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook's stardom.  Multicolored nebulas, planets, and hearts pop against an all black background. They converge in a universe of music and creativity, continuing this message of eternal love with hands making finger hearts as well as the iconic words, I WANT IT REAL LOVE. The song title DNA appears in colorful capital letters on both sides of the statue.   The Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition also features the ARMY symbol, right behind the BTS logo, bringing together past and present in a single elegant design.  Embrace a destiny of true love when you bring home the BTS Premium Logo: DNA Edition today!
